locations.name: Empire
locations.description:
Attempt to take over the world, or at least a significant part of it. Could also be in outer space.

Develop {green|technology} and build resources along the way.

This could be simple like *Risk*, or complex like *Civilization*.

locations.name: Journey
locations.description:
• Various forms of {green|transportation} for part of the trip: train, bus, taxi, plane, boat, wagon.
• Buy food as well as tickets, with a limited supply of {green|money}.
• Consider a foreign country, with some descriptions in other {green|languages}. Include English translations if you plan on sharing the scenario with a wider audience.
• Keep your party safe and healthy through setbacks and challenges.
• The goal could be reaching new territory to settle, winning a bet, or arriving at a vacation spot.

Classic examples are *Oregon Trail* and *Around the World in 80 Days*.

locations.name: Mayor
locations.description:
• Play at {green|politics} to get elected. Try an inspiring slogan to gain popularity, such as, *Change for a brighter future!*
• Persuade congress to pass important laws that the people care about, such as, *More Dogs and Fewer Cats.*
• Build a {green|bigger city}, with transportation, schools, hospitals, and fire departments.

*SimCity* is a good example of city-building, though it doesn't go much into diplomacy.

locations.name: Pet
locations.description:
Grow, train, and play with an animal or fantasy creature.

• Track {green|skills and needs} with general items.
• There is a child responsible for taking care of and enjoying it.

locations.name: River Crossing
locations.description:
• The problem is clear, but you'll need to decide how to {green|solve it}.
• Chop down trees to build a raft, or swim across (might want to practice first), or build a bridge, or look for vines.
• Alternatively, play an {green|escape room}.

Shouldn't last indefinitely, as many scenarios could.

overall settings.title: Unformed Ideas
overall settings.description: A list to look through and take inspiration from. Begin with a [blank setup](/configure) and copy the title and description of your choice into *Overall Settings*.
